Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
/**
 * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.
 */

import { basename } from 'node:path'

import type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'
import type { Translations } from '../i18n/types.js'
import { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// HTML escaping
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function escHtml(text: string): string {
  return text
    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Navigation page IDs
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export type NavPage =
  | 'dashboard'
  | 'transcripts'
  | 'projects'
  | 'graph'
  | 'goals'
  | 'todos'
  | 'knowledge'
  | 'archive'
  | 'search'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Sidebar navigation
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS = `
<script>
(function() {
  // Theme
  var saved = localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') || 'dark';
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', saved);
  // Sidebar collapse
  if (localStorage.getItem('mt-sidebar') === 'collapsed') document.body.classList.add('sidebar-collapsed');
  function updateThemeBtn() {
    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? '鈽€ Light' : '鈽?Dark';
  }
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    updateThemeBtn();
    var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
      localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', next);
      updateThemeBtn();
    });
    // Mobile hamburger
    var hb = document.getElementById('hamburger');
    var sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    var ov = document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay');
    function closeSidebar() {
      if (sb) sb.classList.remove('open');
      if (ov) ov.classList.remove('open');
    }
    if (hb) hb.addEventListener('click', function() {
      if (sb) sb.classList.toggle('open');
      if (ov) ov.classList.toggle('open');
    });
    if (ov) ov.addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);
    // Sidebar collapse toggle
    var collapseBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-collapse');
    if (collapseBtn) collapseBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var collapsed = document.body.classList.toggle('sidebar-collapsed');
      localStorage.setItem('mt-sidebar', collapsed ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded');
    });
    // TOC toggle
    var tocToggle = document.getElementById('toc-toggle');
    var tocList = document.getElementById('toc-list');
    if (tocToggle && tocList) tocToggle.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var expanded = tocToggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
      tocToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', expanded ? 'false' : 'true');
      if (expanded) { tocList.setAttribute('hidden', ''); } else { tocList.removeAttribute('hidden'); }
    });
    // Reader Mode toggle
    var readerBtn = document.getElementById('reader-toggle');
    if (readerBtn) {
      if (localStorage.getItem('mt-reader') === '1') document.body.classList.add('reader-mode');
      readerBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        var on = document.body.classList.toggle('reader-mode');
        localStorage.setItem('mt-reader', on ? '1' : '0');
      });
    }
    // View Transitions API (progressive enhancement)
    if (document.startViewTransition) {
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var a = e.target && (e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('a[href]:not([target]):not([download])') : null);
        if (!a) return;
        var href = a.getAttribute('href');
        if (!href || href.startsWith('#') || href.startsWith('http')) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        document.startViewTransition(function() { window.location.href = href; });
      });
    }
    // Popover preview
    var popover = null;
    document.querySelectorAll('a[data-summary]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {
        var summary = el.getAttribute('data-summary') || '';
        var meta = el.getAttribute('data-meta') || '';
        if (!summary && !meta) return;
        if (!popover) {
          popover = document.createElement('div');
          popover.className = 'popover';
          document.body.appendChild(popover);
        }
        popover.innerHTML = '';
        if (meta) {
          var metaDiv = document.createElement('div');
          metaDiv.className = 'popover-meta';
          metaDiv.textContent = meta;
          popover.appendChild(metaDiv);
        }
        if (summary) {
          var sumDiv = document.createElement('div');
          sumDiv.className = 'popover-summary';
          sumDiv.textContent = summary;
          popover.appendChild(sumDiv);
        }
        popover.style.display = 'block';
        positionPopover(e);
      });
      el.addEventListener('mousemove', positionPopover);
      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
        if (popover) popover.style.display = 'none';
      });
    });
    function positionPopover(e) {
      if (!popover) return;
      var x = e.clientX + 12;
      var y = e.clientY + 12;
      var pw = popover.offsetWidth || 320;
      var ph = popover.offsetHeight || 80;
      if (x + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) x = e.clientX - pw - 12;
      if (y + ph > window.innerHeight - 8) y = e.clientY - ph - 12;
      popover.style.left = x + 'px';
      popover.style.top = y + 'px';
    }
  });
})();
</script>`

interface NavItem {
  id: NavPage
  icon: string
  labelKey: keyof Translations['nav']
  href: string
}

function buildNavItems(depth: 0 | 1 | 2): NavItem[] {
  const p = '../'.repeat(depth)
  return [
    { id: 'dashboard', icon: '馃搳', labelKey: 'dashboard', href: `${p}index.html` },
    { id: 'transcripts', icon: '馃挰', labelKey: 'sessions', href: `${p}transcripts/index.html` },
    { id: 'projects', icon: '馃搧', labelKey: 'projects', href: `${p}projects/index.html` },
    { id: 'graph', icon: '馃暩锔?, labelKey: 'graph', href: `${p}graph.html` },
    { id: 'goals', icon: '馃幆', labelKey: 'goals', href: `${p}goals/index.html` },
    { id: 'todos', icon: '鉁?, labelKey: 'todos', href: `${p}todos/index.html` },
    { id: 'knowledge', icon: '馃摎', labelKey: 'knowledge', href: `${p}knowledge/index.html` },
    { id: 'archive', icon: '馃梽锔?, labelKey: 'archive', href: `${p}archive/index.html` },
    { id: 'search', icon: '馃攳', labelKey: 'search', href: `${p}search.html` },
  ]
}

export function renderNav(current: NavPage, depth: 0 | 1 | 2, t?: Translations): string {
  const items = buildNavItems(depth)

  // Labels for each nav item
  const label = (item: NavItem): string => {
    if (t) return t.nav[item.labelKey]
    // Fallback English labels
    const defaults: Record<string, string> = {
      dashboard: 'Dashboard', sessions: 'Sessions', projects: 'Projects',
      graph: 'Graph', goals: 'Goals', todos: 'Todos',
      knowledge: 'Knowledge', archive: 'Archive', search: 'Search',
    }
    return defaults[item.labelKey] ?? item.labelKey
  }

  const themeLabel = '鈽€ Light'

  const navLinks = items.map(item => {
    const cls = item.id === current ? 'nav-link active' : 'nav-link'
    return `<a href="${escHtml(item.href)}" class="${cls}" title="${escHtml(label(item))}">${escHtml(item.icon)} <span class="nav-label">${escHtml(label(item))}</span></a>`
  }).join('\n      ')

  return `<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-header">
    <span class="sidebar-brand">MemoryTree</span>
    <button class="sidebar-collapse-btn" id="sidebar-collapse" type="button" title="Collapse sidebar">芦</button>
  </div>
  <nav class="sidebar-nav">
    ${navLinks}
  </nav>
  <div class="sidebar-footer">
    <button class="theme-toggle-btn" id="theme-toggle" type="button">${escHtml(themeLabel)}</button>
  </div>
</aside>
<div class="sidebar-overlay" id="sidebar-overlay"></div>`
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// HTML shell
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Transcript URL helpers (single canonical implementation)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * Compute the stem (filename without .md) for a manifest's clean path.
 * Falls back to session_id.
 */
export function manifestStem(m: ManifestEntry): string {
  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
  return cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
}

/**
 * URL to a transcript page relative to the **root** of the report output dir.
 * Use this from index.html and transcripts/index.html.
 */
export function transcriptUrlFromRoot(m: ManifestEntry): string {
  return `transcripts/${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
}

/**
 * URL to a transcript page relative to **another transcript** page.
 * Use this from individual transcript pages.
 */
export function transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m: ManifestEntry): string {
  return `../${m.client}/${manifestStem(m)}.html`
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Client badge (allowlisted CSS class)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const KNOWN_CLIENTS = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])

/** Render a coloured client badge. CSS class is allowlisted to prevent injection. */
export function clientBadge(client: string): string {
  const safeClass = KNOWN_CLIENTS.has(client) ? client : 'unknown'
  return `<span class="badge badge-${safeClass}">${escHtml(client)}</span>`
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Shared MarkdownFile type and slug helper
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface MarkdownFile {
  filename: string
  title: string
  content: string
}

export function slugifyName(name: string): string {
  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// HTML shell
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface HtmlShellOptions {
  extraHead?: string
  lang?: string
  breadcrumb?: string
  /** Inject reader-mode toggle button into the page */
  readerMode?: boolean
  /** Open Graph description (og:description). Truncated to 200 chars. */
  ogDescription?: string
  /** Absolute URL for og:url. Omitted when empty. */
  ogUrl?: string
}

export function htmlShell(
  title: string,
  content: string,
  nav: string,
  extraHeadOrOpts: string | HtmlShellOptions = '',
  lang = 'en',
): string {
  // Accept legacy string arg (extraHead) or new options object
  const opts: HtmlShellOptions = typeof extraHeadOrOpts === 'string'
    ? { extraHead: extraHeadOrOpts, lang }
    : extraHeadOrOpts
  const extraHead = opts.extraHead ?? ''
  const resolvedLang = opts.lang ?? lang
  const breadcrumb = opts.breadcrumb ?? ''
  const readerBtn = opts.readerMode !== false
    ? `<button class="reader-toggle-btn" id="reader-toggle" type="button" title="Toggle reader mode">馃摉</button>`
    : ''

  // Open Graph meta tags
  const ogDesc = opts.ogDescription ? opts.ogDescription.slice(0, 200) : ''
  const ogMeta = [
    `<meta property="og:title" content="${escHtml(title)}">`,
    `<meta property="og:type" content="website">`,
    ogDesc ? `<meta property="og:description" content="${escHtml(ogDesc)}">` : '',
    opts.ogUrl ? `<meta property="og:url" content="${escHtml(opts.ogUrl)}">` : '',
  ].filter(Boolean).join('\n')

  const topbar = `<header class="topbar" id="topbar">
  <span class="topbar-brand">MemoryTree</span>
  <div class="topbar-actions">
    <button class="theme-toggle-btn" id="theme-toggle-mobile" type="button">鈽€</button>
    <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" type="button">鈽?/button>
  </div>
</header>`

  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="${escHtml(resolvedLang)}" data-theme="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>${escHtml(title)} 鈥?MemoryTree</title>
${ogMeta}
<style>${REPORT_CSS}</style>
${extraHead}
${SIDEBAR_INLINE_JS}
</head>
<body>
${topbar}
${nav}
<div class="main-content">
  <div class="container">
${breadcrumb ? `${breadcrumb}\n` : ''}<div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-bottom:0.5rem">${readerBtn}</div>
${content}
  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>`
}

  24: import { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'
  25: import { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'
  26: import { renderTodos } from './render/todos.js'
  27: import { renderArchive } from './render/archive.js'
  28: import { renderProjects } from './render/projects.js'
  29: import { renderGraph } from './render/graph.js'
  30: import { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'
  31: import { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'
  32: import { renderRssFeed } from './render/rss.js'
  33: import { getSummary } from './summarize.js'
  34: import type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'
  35: import { getTags } from './tags.js'
  36: import { loadLocale } from './i18n/index.js'
  37: import type { Translations } from './i18n/types.js'
  38: import { getLogger } from '../heartbeat/log.js'
  39: 
  40: const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
  41: 
  42: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  43: // Main entry point
  44: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  45: 
  46: export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {
  47:   const { root, output } = options
  48:   const noAi = options.noAi ?? false
  49:   const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL
  50:   const locale = options.locale ?? 'en'
  51:   const ghPagesBranch = options.ghPagesBranch ?? ''
  52:   const cname = options.cname ?? ''
  53:   const webhookUrl = options.webhookUrl ?? ''
  54:   const newSessionIds = options.newSessionIds ?? []
  55:   const reportBaseUrl = options.reportBaseUrl ?? ''
  56: 
  57:   // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf
  58:   const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')
  59: 
  60:   // Load translations
  61:   const t: Translations = loadLocale(locale)
  62: 
  63:   clearOutputDir(output)
  64: 
  65:   // Ensure output dirs exist
  66:   mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })
  67:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })
  68:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })
  69:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })
  70:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'todos'), { recursive: true })
  71:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'archive'), { recursive: true })
  72:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'projects'), { recursive: true })
  73:   mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
  74: 
  75:   // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
  76:   ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
  77: 
  78:   // Load all manifests
  79:   const manifests = loadManifests(root)
  80: 
  81:   // Build link graph from clean markdown
  82:   const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
  83: 
  84:   // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
  85:   let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
  86: 
  87:   // Summary options
  88:   const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
  89: 
  90:   // Process each transcript: parse 鈫?summarize 鈫?render 鈫?write 鈫?discard
  91:   const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
  92:   const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}
  93:   const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
  94: 
  95:   for (const m of manifests) {
  96:     const messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
  97: 
  98:     // Tool events from parsed transcript (try raw path)
  99:     const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
 100:     if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
 101:       try {
 102:         const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
 103:         const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
 104:         toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
 105:       } catch {
 106:         // Skip if raw parsing fails
 107:       }
 108:     }
 109: 
 110:     // Search snippet from first message text
 111:     const firstMsg = messages[0]
 112:     snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : ''
 113: 
 114:     // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
 115:     const manifest = m
 116:     const msgs = messages
 117:     summaryPromises.push(
 118:       (async () => {
 119:         try {
 120:         const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
 121:         summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary
 122:         const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
 123:         const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
 124:           .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
 125:           .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
 126: 
 127:         const html = renderTranscript(msgs, manifest, summary, backlinkManifests, t, reportBaseUrl)
 128:         const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
 129:         mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
 130:         writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
 131:         } catch (err: unknown) {
 132:           // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
 133:           getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${manifest.session_id}: ${String(err)}`)
 134:         }
 135:       })(),
 136:     )
 137:   }
 138: 
 139:   // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
 140:   await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
 141: 
 142:   // Extract tags in parallel (after summaries are ready)
 143:   const tagOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
 144:   const tags: Record<string, string[]> = {}
 145:   await Promise.all(
 146:     manifests.map(async m => {
 147:       const summary = summaries[m.session_id] ?? ''
 148:       tags[m.session_id] = await getTags(m.raw_sha256, summary, tagOptions)
 149:     }),
 150:   )
 151: 
 152:   // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
 153:   const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
 154: 
 155:   // Load markdown content for various pages
 156:   const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
 157:   const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))
 158:   const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
 159:   const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))
 160: 
 161:   // Dashboard
 162:   writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')
 163: 
 164:   // Session list
 165:   writeFileSync(
 166:     join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
 167:     renderTranscriptList(manifests, t, summaries, tags),
 168:     'utf-8',
 169:   )
 170: 
 171:   // Goals page
 172:   writeFileSync(
 173:     join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
 174:     renderGoals(goalFiles, t),
 175:     'utf-8',
 176:   )
 177: 
 178:   // Knowledge page
 179:   writeFileSync(
 180:     join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
 181:     renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),
 182:     'utf-8',
 183:   )
 184: 
 185:   // Todos page
 186:   writeFileSync(
 187:     join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
 188:     renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
 189:     'utf-8',
 190:   )
 191: 
 192:   // Archive page
 193:   writeFileSync(
 194:     join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
 195:     renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
 196:     'utf-8',
 197:   )
 198: 
 199:   // Projects page
 200:   writeFileSync(
 201:     join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
 202:     renderProjects(manifests, t),
 203:     'utf-8',
 204:   )
 205: 
 206:   // Knowledge graph
 207:   writeFileSync(
 208:     join(output, 'graph.html'),
 209:     renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
 210:     'utf-8',
 211:   )
 212: 
 213:   // Search
 214:   const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')
 215:   writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
 216: 
 217:   // RSS Feed
 218:   writeFileSync(join(output, 'feed.xml'), renderRssFeed(manifests, summaries, reportBaseUrl), 'utf-8')
 219: 
 220:   // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
 221:   if (ghPagesBranch) {
 222:     try {
 223:       const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
 224:       await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
 225:     } catch {
 226:       // Logged inside deployGithubPages
 227:     }
 228:   } else if (cname) {
 229:     // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)
 230:     writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
 231:   }
 232: 
 233:   // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)
 234:   if (webhookUrl) {
 235:     try {
 236:       const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')
 237:       await sendWebhook({
 238:         url: webhookUrl,
 239:         sessionCount: manifests.length,
 240:         newSessionIds,
 241:       })
 242:     } catch {
 243:       // Logged inside sendWebhook
 244:     }
 245:   }
 246: }
 247: 
 248: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 249: // Manifest loading
 250: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 251: 
 252: function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
 253:   const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
 254:   if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
 255: 
 256:   const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
 257:   loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
 258:   return manifests
 259: }
 260: 
 261: function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
 262:   let entries: string[]
 263:   try {
 264:     entries = readdirSync(dir)
 265:   } catch {
 266:     return
 267:   }
 268: 
 269:   for (const entry of entries) {
 270:     const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
 271:     if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {
 272:       try {
 273:         const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
 274:         const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(raw)
 275:         if (
 276:           parsed !== null &&
 277:           typeof parsed === 'object' &&
 278:           typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['session_id'] === 'string' &&
 279:           typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['client'] === 'string'
 280:         ) {
 281:           out.push(parsed as ManifestEntry)
 282:         }
 283:       } catch {
 284:         // Skip malformed manifests
 285:       }
 286:     } else {
 287:       // Recurse into subdirectories
 288:       loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)
 289:     }
 290:   }
 291: }
 292: 
 293: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 294: // Clean markdown message parsing
 295: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 296: 
 297: /** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
 298: export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
 299:   const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path
 300:     ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)
 301:     : m.global_clean_path
 302:   if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
 303: 
 304:   let content: string
 305:   try {
 306:     content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
 307:   } catch {
 308:     return []
 309:   }
 310: 
 311:   return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
 312: }
 313: 
 314: /** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
 315: export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
 316:   const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
 317: 
 318:   // Find ## Messages section
 319:   const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
 320:   if (msgSection === -1) return []
 321: 
 322:   const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
 323: 
 324:   // Split on ### N. role headers
 325:   const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
 326:   let match: RegExpExecArray | null
 327:   const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
 328: 
 329:   while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
 330:     starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
 331:   }
 332: 
 333:   for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
 334:     const start = starts[i]
 335:     if (!start) continue
 336:     const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
 337:     const chunk = nextStart
 338:       ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
 339:       : body.slice(start.index)
 340: 
 341:     const lines = chunk.split('\n')
 342:     // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
 343:     let timestamp = ''
 344:     const textLines: string[] = []
 345:     let pastHeader = false
 346: 
 347:     for (const line of lines) {
 348:       if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
 349:         pastHeader = true
 350:         continue
 351:       }
 352:       if (!pastHeader) continue
 353:       const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
 354:       if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
 355:         timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
 356:         continue
 357:       }
 358:       textLines.push(line)
 359:     }
 360: 
 361:     // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
 362:     const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
 363:     if (text || timestamp) {
 364:       messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
 365:     }
 366:   }
 367: 
 368:   return messages
 369: }
 370: 
 371: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 372: // Raw transcript tool extraction
 373: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 374: 
 375: /** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
 376: function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
 377:   const summaries: string[] = []
 378:   let content: string
 379:   try {
 380:     content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
 381:   } catch {
 382:     return []
 383:   }
 384: 
 385:   for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
 386:     const trimmed = line.trim()
 387:     if (!trimmed) continue
 388:     try {
 389:       const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
 390:       // Codex: function_call type
 391:       const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
 392:       if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
 393:         const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
 394:         summaries.push(name)
 395:         continue
 396:       }
 397:       // Claude: tool_use content blocks
 398:       const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
 399:       const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
 400:       if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
 401:         for (const block of content2) {
 402:           if (
 403:             block !== null &&
 404:             typeof block === 'object' &&
 405:             (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
 406:           ) {
 407:             const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
 408:             summaries.push(name)
 409:           }
 410:         }
 411:       }
 412:     } catch {
 413:       // Skip malformed lines
 414:     }
 415:   }
 416: 
 417:   return summaries
 418: }
 419: 
 420: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 421: // Output path helpers
 422: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 423: 
 424: function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
 425:   const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
 426:   const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
 427:   return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
 428: }
 429: 
 430: function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
 431:   if (m.repo_raw_path) {
 432:     return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
 433:   }
 434:   if (m.global_raw_path) {
 435:     return m.global_raw_path
 436:   }
 437:   return null
 438: }
 439: 
 440: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 441: // Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge/todos/archive)
 442: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 443: 
 444: function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
 445:   if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
 446: 
 447:   let entries: string[]
 448:   try {
 449:     entries = readdirSync(dir)
 450:   } catch {
 451:     return []
 452:   }
 453: 
 454:   return entries
 455:     .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
 456:     .sort()
 457:     .map(filename => {
 458:       const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
 459:       let content = ''
 460:       try {
 461:         content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
 462:       } catch {
 463:         // empty
 464:       }
 465:       const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')
 466:       return { filename, title, content }
 467:     })
 468: }
 469: 
 470: function clearOutputDir(output: string): void {
 471:   if (!existsSync(output)) return
 472: 
 473:   let entries: string[]
 474:   try {
 475:     entries = readdirSync(output)
 476:   } catch {
 477:     return
 478:   }
 479: 
 480:   for (const entry of entries) {
 481:     try {
 482:       rmSync(join(output, entry), { recursive: true, force: true })
 483:     } catch {
 484:       // Best-effort cleanup
 485:     }
 486:   }
 487: }
 488: 
 489: function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
 490:   const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
 491:   return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''
 492: }
 493: 
 494: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 495: // .gitignore management
 496: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 497: 
 498: export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
 499:   const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
 500:   let existing = ''
 501:   if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
 502:     try {
 503:       existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
 504:     } catch {
 505:       return
 506:     }
 507:   }
 508:   // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
 509:   const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
 510:   if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
 511: 
 512:   // Append with trailing newline
 513:   const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
 514:   try {
 515:     appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
 516:   } catch {
 517:     // Best-effort
 518:   }
 519: }

assistant #1533 final_answer 09:13:36

原因很简单：http://127.0.0.1:10010/projects/index.html 这个页面，不是“全局 heartbeat 已注册项目列表”，而是“当前这个报告站点里的项目页”。

现在 10010 上挂的是当前仓库这一个站点，Caddy 配置已经写死到 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sites/d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy#L7) 和 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sites/d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy#L10)，根目录就是 [Memory/07_reports](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/Memory/07_reports)。

而这个 projects 页的生成逻辑，在 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L22) 里是从“当前报告加载到的 manifests”来算的；具体数据源是 [build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L78) 和 [build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L252)，只会读当前仓库下面的 Memory/06_transcripts/manifests。然后它再按 cwd 的最后一段分组，在 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L13) 和 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L35) 这里做，所以最后只显示出 memorytree-workflow 这 1 个项目。

所以：
- daemon status 里的 Projects: 3 = 机器级 heartbeat 当前注册了 3 个项目
- 10010/projects/index.html 里的 1 project(s) = 当前这个被 Caddy 暴露出来的单仓库报告里，只统计到了 1 个项目

这不是异常，按现在实现来说是正常现象。

如果你想，我下一步可以帮你做两种之一：
- 给 papaweb 也单独挂一个本地网页入口
- 设计一个“全局 3 项目总览页”，把注册的项目都汇总到一个页面里

total 19565771in 19439058out 126713reason 73679
task_completed #1535 019d0a83-c449-7ad1-9b4a-bac9a0877a67 09:13:36
原因很简单：`http://127.0.0.1:10010/projects/index.html` 这个页面，不是“全局 heartbeat 已注册项目列表”，而是“当前这个报告站点里的项目页”。 现在 `10010` 上挂的是当前仓库这一个站点，Caddy 配置已经写死到 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sit...

原因很简单：http://127.0.0.1:10010/projects/index.html 这个页面，不是“全局 heartbeat 已注册项目列表”，而是“当前这个报告站点里的项目页”。

现在 10010 上挂的是当前仓库这一个站点，Caddy 配置已经写死到 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sites/d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy#L7) 和 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sites/d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy#L10)，根目录就是 [Memory/07_reports](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/Memory/07_reports)。

而这个 projects 页的生成逻辑，在 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L22) 里是从“当前报告加载到的 manifests”来算的；具体数据源是 [build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L78) 和 [build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L252)，只会读当前仓库下面的 Memory/06_transcripts/manifests。然后它再按 cwd 的最后一段分组，在 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L13) 和 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L35) 这里做，所以最后只显示出 memorytree-workflow 这 1 个项目。

所以：
- daemon status 里的 Projects: 3 = 机器级 heartbeat 当前注册了 3 个项目
- 10010/projects/index.html 里的 1 project(s) = 当前这个被 Caddy 暴露出来的单仓库报告里，只统计到了 1 个项目

这不是异常，按现在实现来说是正常现象。

如果你想，我下一步可以帮你做两种之一：
- 给 papaweb 也单独挂一个本地网页入口
- 设计一个“全局 3 项目总览页”，把注册的项目都汇总到一个页面里

Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question.   "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\r\n\r\n## Read Order\r\n- Read this file first.\r\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\r\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\r\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\r\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\r\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\r\n\r\n## Memory Rules\r\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\r\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\r\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\r\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\r\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\r\n\r\n## Transcript Rules\r\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\r\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\r\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\r\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\r\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\r\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\r\n\r\n## Git Rules\r\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\r\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\r\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\r\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\r\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\r\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\r\n\r\n## Heartbeat Rules\r\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\r\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\r\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\r\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\r\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.\r\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\r\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #1541 final_answer 09:15:45

公允地说：你的直觉是有道理的，这里现在有“概念混淆”。 结论分两层： 1. 按当前代码实现来看，`http://127.0.0.1:10010/projects/index.html` 不是全局项目页，而是“当前这个仓库报告站点里的 projects 页”。 原因很明确： - Caddy 现在把 `10010` 只指向了当前仓库的 [Memory/07_reports](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/...

Expand full message

公允地说：你的直觉是有道理的，这里现在有“概念混淆”。

结论分两层：

1. 按当前代码实现来看，http://127.0.0.1:10010/projects/index.html 不是全局项目页，而是“当前这个仓库报告站点里的 projects 页”。
原因很明确：
- Caddy 现在把 10010 只指向了当前仓库的 [Memory/07_reports](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/Memory/07_reports)；配置见 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sites/d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy#L7) 和 [d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy](/C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/caddy/sites/d-demo1-memorytree-workflow-d-demo1-memorytree-workflow.caddy#L10)
- 报告构建时只读取当前仓库下的 transcript manifests，见 [build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L78) 和 [build.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts#L252)
- projects 页只是把这些 manifests 再按 cwd 末段分组，见 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L22) 和 [projects.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/projects.ts#L35)

2. 但按产品理解和命名体验来看，你说“逻辑不对”也是成立的。
因为：
- heartbeat 是全局注册的，daemon status 里看到的是 3 个项目
- 页面名字却叫 Projects
- 用户很自然会理解成“全局项目列表”
- 实际上它显示的是“当前站点里出现过的项目分组”

所以我的公允判断是：
- 代码行为本身是自洽的，不是运行 bug
- 但产品语义和页面命名是有问题的，至少是明显误导
- 如果产品目标是“机器级 MemoryTree 总览”，那这个页面现在确实不对
- 如果产品目标只是“单仓库报告站点”，那实现没错，但 Projects 这个名字偏大，容易让人误会

我更倾向于把它定性为“产品/信息架构问题”，不是底层故障。

比较合理的改法有两种：
- 保守改法：把这个页改名成 Workspaces / Transcript Sources / Session Groups，明确它不是全局项目注册页
- 正向改法：新增一个真正的全局项目总览页，读取 ~/.memorytree/config.toml 或全局索引，把 3 个注册项目都列出来

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你做一次 review 结论文档，或者直接动手把这个逻辑改正确。

- heartbeat 是全局注册的，daemon status 里看到的是 3 个项目
- 页面名字却叫 Projects
- 用户很自然会理解成“全局项目列表”
- 实际上它显示的是“当前站点里出现过的项目分组”

- 保守改法：把这个页改名成 Workspaces / Transcript Sources / Session Groups，明确它不是全局项目注册页
